type_ia.name: Type Ia Supernovae
type_ia.mechanism: More effective time for WD binary evolution
type_ia.observable: SN Ia rate per unit stellar mass
type_ia.falsification: No rate difference between high/low Gamma_t at fixed mass

core_collapse.name: Core-Collapse Supernovae
core_collapse.mechanism: CC SNe track recent SFR, not integrated history
core_collapse.observable: CC SN rate per unit SFR
core_collapse.falsification: Strong Gamma_t dependence would contradict TEP

ratio_ia_cc.name: Type Ia / Core-Collapse Ratio
ratio_ia_cc.mechanism: Ia rate enhanced, CC rate unchanged
ratio_ia_cc.falsification: Constant ratio across Gamma_t would contradict TEP

key_discriminant.falsification: No differential response would falsify TEP

observing_requirements.key_measurement: SN rate per unit mass vs host Gamma_t
